case_title: UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA VS. TRAM-ANH THI NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF TRAM-ANH THI NGUYEN). WITHHOLDING WILL BE $25 PER PAY PERIOD. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED (ORDER SIGNED) (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: MS. NGUYEN DID NOT CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING RE: PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. TRAM-ANH NGUYEN'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE SHERIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO WITHHOLD WAGES FROM TRAM-ANH THI NGUYEN IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 25.00 PER PAY PERIOD PURSUANT TO THE ORDER ISSUED ON APRIL 21, 2011. THE COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,966.89 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $3,961.40 INTEREST, $632.05 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 16061004) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tram-Anh Nguyen appears as defendant/claimant, In Propria Persona

No other appearance is made in this matter

Court hears from claimant.

Defendant Tram-Anh Nguyen's claim of exemption is GRANTED. Bank-levied funds are ordered returned to the judgment debtor. Court will issue a written order.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Tram-Anh Nguyen, Tel. 415.387.2570, defendant/judgment debtor/claimant, appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Ms. Nguyen did not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling re: PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. Tram-Anh Nguyen's Claim of Exemption is denied. The Sheriff is instructed to withhold wages from Tram-Anh Thi Nguyen in the amount of $ 25.00 per pay period pursuant to the Order issued on April 21, 2011. The Court shall prepare the order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Notice And Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Allan Samson, J.D., 415-391-4949, specially appearing for plaintiff, University of Pennsylvania

RULING:
Matter was not argued because plaintiff's counsel did not notify other side of his intent to appear. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption (of TRAM-ANH THI NGUYEN).
Withholding will be $25 per pay period. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not Reported (301/PJB)
